Localization.Description: Suspicious logon via Active Directory Federation Services (AD FS). Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from new host {src.host} received an AD FS security token on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
New user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} received an AD FS security token on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} received an AD FS security token to access new resource {datafield7} on host {event_src.host}. The resource is missing from the collected profile.
